title: BMad Manifest Schema
description: Unified schema for all BMad skill manifest files (agents, workflows, skills)

module-code.description: Short code for the module this skill belongs to (e.g., bmb, cis). Omit for standalone skills.

replaces-skill.description: Registered name of the BMad skill this replaces. Inherits metadata during bmad-init.

persona.description: Succinct distillation of the agent's essence — who they are, how they operate, what drives them. Presence of this field indicates the skill is an agent. Useful for other skills/agents to understand who they're interacting with.

has-memory.description: Whether this skill persists state across sessions via sidecar memory.

capabilities.description: What this skill can do. Every skill has at least one capability.

menu-code.description: 2-3 uppercase letter shortcut for interactive menus

description.description: What this capability does and when to suggest it

supports-headless.description: Whether this capability can run without user interaction

prompt.description: Relative path to the prompt file for internal capabilities (e.g., build-process.md). Omit if handled by SKILL.md directly or if this is an external skill call.

skill-name.description: Registered name of an external skill this capability delegates to. Omit for internal capabilities.

phase-name.description: Which module phase this capability belongs to (e.g., planning, design, anytime). For module sequencing.

after.description: Skill names that should ideally run before this capability. If is-required is true on those skills, they block this one.

before.description: Skill names that this capability should ideally run before. Helps the module sequencer understand ordering.

is-required.description: Whether this capability must complete before skills listed in its 'before' array can proceed.

output-location.description: Where this capability writes its output. May contain config variables (e.g., {bmad_builder_output_folder}/agents/).
